mnemonics: EVERY Secret Data Is Protected Securely (ESDIPS) - Encryption, Segmentation, DLP, IAM, Patches, Scanning
keyPoints: Encryption is fundamental for data at rest, in transit, and in use.
Data Loss Prevention (DLP) tools monitor and control data transfer to prevent leaks.
Regular software patching is critical to eliminate known security vulnerabilities.
commonMistakes: Assuming cloud provider handles all security, leading to misconfigured services (shared responsibility model).
Focusing only on external threats while neglecting insider threats and inadequate access controls.
